name: Leonardo DRS, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Leonardo DRS, Inc. provides advanced defense technology to U.S. national security customers and allied defense forces worldwide. We specialize in the design, development, manufacture, and integration of advanced sensing, network computing, force protection, and electric power and propulsion technologies and solutions.
